title: iTaq Universal SYBR Green qPCR
description: Bio-Rad SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR with iTaq hot-start polymerase: activation, 40 cycles, and a 65-95 C melt curve.

final.name: Melt curve: 65 to 95 C, 0.5 C increments

ingredients.name: DNA template (cDNA 100 ng-100 fg; gDNA 50 ng-5 pg)

payload.notes: SYBR Green chemistry; run the melt curve (65 to 95 C in 0.5 C increments, 2-5 sec/step) to confirm specificity. Polymerase activation 95 C 30 sec (20-30 sec for cDNA, 2-5 min for genomic DNA). Primers 300-500 nM each (final). On the Bio-Rad CFX the denature step can be as short as 2-5 sec; on standard-mode ABI or Roche cyclers use 95 C 15 sec and 60 C 60 sec. 35-40 cycles. Source: iTaq Universal SYBR Green Supermix product insert (Bio-Rad 10000068167), https://www.bio-rad.com/webroot/web/pdf/lsr/literature/10000068167.pdf
